generated_assessment.reasoning: This profile shows very low Openness (14th pct), particularly on ideas (0th) and values (17th), suggesting a conventional, skeptical posture toward new or elite-driven narratives. Very low Trust (40th) and Tender-Mindedness (16th) combine with tough-minded Agreeableness to produce a critical view of mainstream journalism as self-serving or untrustworthy. Low Achievement Striving (5th) and Dutifulness (0th) imply indifference to institutional authority, further damping trust in established news sources. The moderate-to-low Positive Emotions (28th) and Neuroticism around the 40th percentile yield a steady, non-anxious distrust rather than outrage, settling in the 'clear opposition' range.

message.reasoning: We are reviewing a baseline (pre-attack) assessment. The opinion leaf is "Trust_In_Mainstream_Journalism". The generated score is -423. Profile shows very low Openness, very low Trust, low Agreeableness facets (Tender-Mindedness), low Conscientiousness (Achievement Striving, Dutifulness). Reasoning ties these to skepticism toward mainstream journalism. Score -423 is in the "clear opposition" range (around -500) but not extreme (-423 is not exactly -500 or -250, so no round-number anchoring). It's a fine-grained value. The profile supports distrust. No issues. Plausibility and consistency are high. No rewrite needed.
